eventTypeTooltip.DIVIDEND: Cash distribution from equity/ETF. Price drops on ex-date.
eventTypeTooltip.INTEREST: Interest payment from debt instrument or loan.
eventTypeTooltip.SPLIT: Stock/unit split. Quantity changes, total value unchanged.
eventTypeTooltip.PRICE_ADJUSTMENT: Non-cash value change: write-down, haircut, re-rating.
eventTypeTooltip.MATURITY_SETTLEMENT: Final capital return at maturity. No further pricing.

assetDetail.livePriceConversionFailed: Live price shown in {currency} — FX rate unavailable for today

currencyChange.title: Change asset currency ({from} → {to})
currencyChange.autoSyncInfo: After wipe, prices will be auto-synced from the provider starting from {from}.
currencyChange.noProviderInfo: No provider assigned — after wipe you will need to re-import prices manually.
currencyChange.summaryEvents: {manual} manual events + {provider} provider-generated events will be deleted.
currencyChange.summaryLinkedTx: {n} transactions will be DISCONNECTED from their events (transactions themselves are preserved).
currencyChange.progressWipe: Wiping {prices} prices + {events} events and disconnecting {linkedTx} transactions…
currencyChange.bodyIntro: Changing the currency requires wiping all stored market data (see the summary below). LibreFolio will then attempt to re-sync prices and events from the provider in the new currency.
currencyChange.bodyCaveat: Any transactions that were linked to the deleted events will be disconnected — you are responsible for reattaching them to the newly-synced events if needed.

modal.title: Add Asset
modal.autoAssignInfo: Provider "{provider}" will be auto-assigned on create
modal.duplicateName: An asset with this name already exists
modal.duplicateNameTooltip: An asset with this exact name already exists. You may want to edit the existing one instead of creating a new one.
modal.providerIncomplete: You changed the provider but left the identifier empty. Please fill the identifier (or tick "No provider") before saving.
modal.createSuccessProviderFailed: Asset "{name}" created, but provider assignment failed. Assign it manually.
modal.scheduledRegenMessage: Changing these parameters will delete the existing price history and regenerate it with the new schedule. This action cannot be undone. Continue?
modal.quoteBaseTooltip: Specifies how many shares or units the market price refers to. For ETFs or stocks it is typically 1; bonds are usually quoted on a base of 100.
modal.activeTooltip: If active, the asset will be updated automatically by the scheduler and remain visible in selectors. Disable it to hide the asset when you no longer own it or do not want to keep downloading prices.

schedule.title: Interest Schedule
schedule.periodHint:
Start and end date of this interest period.
Both dates are inclusive (the end date is the last day of the period).
schedule.rateHint:
Annual interest rate as percentage.
Example: 5.00 = 5% per year.
schedule.deleteBoundaryHint: Choose the boundary date to redistribute this period's range between its neighbors.
schedule.splitBoundaryHint: Choose the date where this period will be split into two.
schedule.emptyHint: Add at least one period to configure the investment schedule.
schedule.maturationFrequencyHint: How often interest matures within the period.
schedule.generateInterestHint: Auto-generate coupon payout events at each maturation date. The interest accrued is paid out and the asset resets to initial value.
schedule.interestTypeTooltip: Determines how interest is calculated. Simple: interest on initial value only. Compound: interest accrues on accumulated interest too.
schedule.dayCountTooltip: Convention for counting days in the interest period. ACT/365 and ACT/360 are the most common. Affects how daily interest is calculated.

comparison.description: The provider returned values that differ from your current data. Review and choose which to accept.

distribution.emptyHint: No data — use +Add or Ask Provider

tooltip.unresolvedReason: Asset not found in the database.

tooltip.possibleDup: A similar transaction was found in this broker (same date, type and amount, different description). Verify whether it has already been imported before proceeding.
tooltip.likelyDup: An identical transaction already exists in this broker (same date, type, amount and description). It has likely already been imported — deselect it to avoid duplicates.

addIdentifier.title: Add identifier to asset?
addIdentifier.body: {asset} does not have {value} ({type}) as an identifier. Do you want to add it so future imports can match automatically?
addIdentifier.bodyConflict: {asset} already has {existing} as {type}. The import uses {value} instead — do you want to replace it?

confidenceTip.exact: Exact match: symbol and asset type both match precisely
confidenceTip.high: High confidence: strong symbol or ISIN match
confidenceTip.medium: Medium confidence: symbol match only (type not verified)
confidenceTip.low: Low confidence: partial or name-only match

chartSettings.title: Chart Settings
chartSettings.globalWarning: These settings will override all per-card customizations.
chartSettings.noSignals: No overlay signals configured. Add one below.
chartSettings.discardMessage: You have unsaved changes in chart settings. Discard them?
chartSettings.dataMissingBefore: Data starts after chart range — first point at {date}. Try syncing to fetch earlier data.
chartSettings.previewDescGlobal: Synthetic demo data — shows how aesthetics affect all charts
chartSettings.previewDescPair: Live preview with actual pair data and overlay signals

signals.assetComparisonDesc: Overlay another asset's price on this chart for comparison
signals.fxPairDesc: Overlay an FX pair's rate on this chart for comparison

tooltips.annualRate: Annual growth rate in percent. Applied linearly or exponentially depending on the signal type.
tooltips.amplitude: Peak-to-peak oscillation range as percentage of the base value.
tooltips.period: Memory length of the filter in days. Higher values = smoother but slower response.
tooltips.offset: Vertical offset as percentage of the base value. Shifts the signal up or down.
tooltips.currencyPair: Select an FX pair to overlay its exchange rate data on the chart.
tooltips.emaPeriod: Lookback window in days. Maps to filter coefficient $\alpha = 2/(N+1)$. Shorter = faster reaction, longer = smoother.
tooltips.fastPeriod: Short-term EMA lookback for the MACD fast line. Standard: 12 days. Lower values react faster to price changes.
tooltips.slowPeriod: Long-term EMA lookback for the MACD slow line. Standard: 26 days. Higher values capture the broader trend.
tooltips.signalPeriod: EMA smoothing applied to the MACD line. Standard: 9 days. Reduces noise in crossover signals.
tooltips.multiplier: Number of standard deviations ($k \cdot \sigma$). $k=2$ covers ~95% of values assuming normal distribution.
tooltips.overbought: Level above which the asset is considered overbought. Standard: 70. Values near 100 indicate strong buying pressure.
tooltips.oversold: Level below which the asset is considered oversold. Standard: 30. Values near 0 indicate strong selling pressure.
tooltips.assetComparison: Select an asset to overlay its price on this chart. In percentage mode, both curves start at 0%.
tooltips.fxPair: Select an FX pair to overlay its exchange rate on this chart. In percentage mode, both curves start at 0%.

chartSettings.noDataAvailable: No data available. Try syncing this asset/pair.
chartSettings.conversionFailed: Currency conversion failed — data not shown (FX pair not configured)

common.discardChangesMessage: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to close?
common.name: Name

csvImport.title: Import CSV Data
csvImport.dropFile: Drop a .csv or .txt file here, or click to browse
csvImport.helpFormat: Use 2-column format with a header indicating direction:
csvImport.helpDirection: Use the ⇄ button or header to set rate direction
csvImport.helpDecimals: Both . and , are accepted as decimal separators. Use _ as optional thousands separator (e.g. 1_000.50)
csvImport.discardMessage: You have edited CSV data. Are you sure you want to close without importing?

dashboard.unrealizedDeltaTooltip: Change in unrealized gain/loss on positions still open.
dashboard.realizedSalesTooltip: Realized gain or loss from sales in the period, calculated against average cost basis.
dashboard.incomeTooltip: Income received in the period from dividends, interest or coupons.
dashboard.marketValueTooltip: Current market value of your portfolio at end of period.
dashboard.bookValueTooltip: Average purchase cost of open positions (WAC × quantity). Excludes cash.
dashboard.cashValueTooltip: Total cash held in broker accounts.
dashboard.periodScopeNote: Metrics calculated over the selected period
dashboard.timingEffectTooltip: If positive, deposits and withdrawals happened at favorable times and improved your return compared to the pure strategy. If negative, they happened at unfavorable times.
dashboard.twrrTooltip:
Strategy return,
neutralizing deposits and withdrawals.
dashboard.mwrrCumTooltip:
Money-weighted return of the period,
considering amounts and timing of flows.
dashboard.mwrrAnnTooltip:
Annualized equivalent rate
of money-weighted return.
dashboard.geoUnclassified: Geographic data unavailable for {pct}% of portfolio value
dashboard.roiAllZero: Returns are 0% for the selected period
dashboard.costsTooltip: Fees and taxes recorded in the selected period.
dashboard.periodPnlTooltip: Total gain or loss attributable to the selected period only (unrealized change + realized + income − fees). May differ from the position's total lifetime gain.
dashboard.pnlChange1dTooltip: Change in unrealized P&L versus yesterday, keeping today's quantity constant.
dashboard.pnlChange1dPercentTooltip: Δ P&L versus yesterday as a percentage of yesterday's unrealized P&L.
dashboard.otherPeriodEffectsSubtitle: Effects that contribute to period P&L but are not linked to a specific asset
dashboard.unrealizedPnlPercentTooltip: Unrealized P&L as a percentage of the residual cost basis (Unrealized P&L / cost basis).
dashboard.pmcTooltip: Average cost per unit of the currently open position.

dataQuality.missingPrice: {count} asset(s) have no market price — excluded from NAV
dataQuality.transactionImplied: {count} asset(s) still valued at cost — no market price available for over 2 weeks (as of {as_of_date})
dataQuality.missingFx: Missing FX rates for {count} pair(s) — totals may be incomplete
dataQuality.navIncomplete: NAV incomplete for {count} day(s) between {date_from} and {date_to}
dataQuality.mwrrNotAvailable: MWRR cannot be calculated for this period
dataQuality.mwrrSeriesUnreliable: MWRR chart unavailable: series diverged by {divergence_pp}pp from expected {summary_cum}% (first at {first_bad_date})
dataQuality.archivedAsset: This asset is archived — not updated by scheduler
dataQuality.fxPairMissing: FX pair not configured — conversion not available
dataQuality.fxPairPartialGap: Partial gap in rates — data from {date}

dataEditor.staleTooltip: Hide backward-filled rows (⚠️ stale). These are gap-fill points copied from the nearest real data point.

autoEvent.tooltip: Auto-generated by a price provider. Edits are disabled because they would be overwritten on the next sync. Deleting is also temporary — the provider will recreate the event on next sync. To remove it permanently, change the asset's provider configuration.

wac.fxDisclaimer: The FX rate used may differ from the one applied by your broker. Verify the average cost with your broker.

bulkDelete.title: Delete transactions
bulkDelete.intro: Linked transactions (transfers, FX conversions) must be deleted together.
bulkDelete.noConflict: Other {n} row(s) have no linked partner — will be deleted as-is.
bulkDelete.summary: Final batch: {total} to delete (clean: {clean} · extended: {extended} + {partners} partners · removed: {removed})
bulkDelete.rolledBack: Delete was cancelled — no changes were made.

validate.autoOff: Auto-validate is OFF ({n} rows > {threshold}) — press ⚡️ Validate now before commit
validate.contextualIssuesHeader: With the other pending changes, this row causes the following issues:

errors.idRequired: Transaction ID is required and must be > 0
errors.cashRequired: {type} requires a cash amount and currency
errors.cashForbidden: {type} must not have a cash movement
errors.linkUuidRequired: {type} requires a link UUID for pairing
errors.fxConversionCashRequired: FX Conversion requires a non-zero cash amount
errors.eventRequiresAsset: Event link requires an asset to be selected
errors.eventTypeIncompatible: {type} cannot be linked to an asset event (only {allowed})
errors.balanceCashNegative: Saving would cause {currency} cash to go negative ({formattedBalance}) on {date} at {brokerName}
errors.balanceAssetNegative: Saving would cause {assetName} holdings to go negative ({balance}) on {date} at {brokerName}
errors.accessDenied: Access denied: EDITOR role required for {brokerName}
errors.pairTypeMismatch: Linked pair must share the same type (found {typeA} and {typeB})
errors.pairSameBroker: Transfer requires distinct brokers (both assigned to {brokerName})
errors.cannotLinkEventNoAsset: Cannot link an asset event without an asset
errors.typeCannotSplit: This transaction type cannot be split
errors.splitIdsMismatch: The two transactions are not a linked pair
errors.promoteRefNotFound: Transaction referenced for promotion not found
errors.alreadyPaired: Transaction is already linked to another transaction
errors.noPromoteRule: No promotion rule matches these two transaction types
errors.costBasisRequired: ❌ {type} with positive quantity requires a cost basis. Use Auto mode (WAC) or enter a manual value.

fieldErrors.quantityInvalid: Quantity must be a valid number
fieldErrors.cashRequired: Cash amount and currency are required
